---
name: Component Request
about: Request a new UI component for the registry
title: "[COMPONENT] "
labels: components
assignees: ''

---

## Component Details
- **Name**: [e.g. Accordion, DatePicker]
- **Target Framework**: [e.g. CustomTkinter, PyQt]

## Describe the component
Provide a clear description of what this component should do and how it should look.

## Examples / References
Provide links to existing implementations (e.g., shadcn/ui, material UI) or images demonstrating the desired design.
